name: @sahajamit/figma-cli
description: CLI for Figma — read designs, export images, extract tokens. Works with any AI agent.
author: Amit Rawat <sahajamit@gmail.com> (https://amitrawat.dev/)

scripts.build: tsc && chmod +x dist/bin/figma.js && npm run copy-skills
scripts.copy-skills: mkdir -p dist/src/skills/figma dist/src/skills/figma-files dist/src/skills/figma-design && cp src/skills/figma/SKILL.md dist/src/skills/figma/SKILL.md && cp src/skills/figma-files/SKILL.md dist/src/skills/figma-files/SKILL.md && cp src/skills/figma-design/SKILL.md dist/src/skills/figma-design/SKILL.md
